caption: A man with dark skin and glasses sits in a studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a distinctive, tall, spiky gray wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs and some fabric items. A logo on the left side of the frame reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a small microphone icon. On the right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains largely stationary, facing slightly to the left of the camera with a neutral expression. Subtle changes in his facial expression and slight movements of his head occur as the sequence progresses, but he does not speak or engage in significant action.
